name: golang-github-jung-kurt-gofpdf-dev
title: golang-github-jung-kurt-gofpdf-dev
summary: PDF document generator with high level support for text, drawing and images
description:
PDF document generator with high level support for text, drawing and images
Package gofpdf implements a PDF document generator with high level
support for text, drawing and images.  Features
* UTF-8 support
* Choice of measurement unit, page format and margins
* Page header and footer management
* Automatic page breaks, line breaks, and text justification
* Inclusion of JPEG, PNG, GIF, TIFF and basic path-only SVG images
* Colors, gradients and alpha channel transparency
* Outline bookmarks
* Internal and external links
* TrueType, Type1 and encoding support
* Page compression
* Lines, Bézier curves, arcs, and ellipses
* Rotation, scaling, skewing, translation, and mirroring
* Clipping
* Document protection
* Layers
* Templates
* Barcodes
* Charting facility
* Import PDFs as templates
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jung-kurt-gofpdf-dev because PDF document generator with high level support for text, drawing and images.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jung-kurt-gofpdf-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jung-kurt-gofpdf-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jung-kurt-gofpdf-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
